title: lora_l2.c tx_buf_mutex held during entire lora_send blocking call
close_reason: Design is correct - tx_buf is a shared static buffer that lora_send() reads during transmission. Releasing the mutex early would allow corruption. Since the radio hardware is single-threaded, serialization is inherent anyway. The code is already well-documented explaining this tradeoff (lines 70-72, 593-601).
